title: Phase 4B: Product module - service, API, catalogue, detail
description: Build the product module: product service, API routes, product catalogue page showing cost/sell/margin/vendor/inventory, and product detail page.
steps: Create src/lib/services/product.service.ts with CRUD, search, inventory lookup, cost history
Create src/app/api/products/route.ts with GET (list/search) and POST (create)
Create src/app/api/products/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT, DELETE
Create src/app/(dashboard)/products/page.tsx with product catalogue DataTable
Show columns: SKU, name, category, cost, sell, margin%, vendor, on-hand qty
Include cost history chart, vendor sources, inventory by location, order history
